flags.concern: Tool alias scope: `recent_messages` is not backed by a Store method that can honor `recent_messages(epic_id, n)`; the plan’s proposed hot-context-backed alias would only return the fixed hot-context window, so larger `n` values would be silently truncated unless the spec explicitly defines that cap or the implementation uses an existing query path that can actually apply the requested limit.
flags.evidence: `planning-bot-spec.md` lists `recent_messages(epic_id, n)`. `agent_kit/store/sqlite.py::load_hot_context` and `agent_kit/store/supabase.py::load_hot_context` load recent messages with `LIMIT 10`, while `agent_kit/ports.py` exposes `search_messages` but no general recent-message listing method. The plan says to implement the alias as a thin read over hot-context/recent-message data and also says not to refactor Store/ports.
